instant.description: Direct user feedback — press scale, toggle, focus ring

fast.description: Immediate response — dropdown open, hover, button background

normal.description: System choreography — accordion expand, stagger, carousel

relaxed.description: Dramatic entrances — dialog pop, sheet reveal, page transitions

slow.description: Deliberate slow reveals — onboarding sequences, hero sections

standard.description: State changes — background, border, color; hover, press, toggle

entrance.description: Elements entering the screen; give users time to orient

exit.description: Elements leaving the screen; get out of the way quickly

linear.description: Constant-speed transitions with no acceleration or deceleration

none.description: No intentional pause before animation starts

long.description: Extended pause for complex sequential animations

tight.description: Delay between consecutive items — dropdown menu items

normal.description: Delay between consecutive items — card grids

relaxed.description: Delay between consecutive items — onboarding steps
